title: 10 Things You May Not Know About Me
excerpt: If you follow me on Instagram (username: amytangerine), you may have already seen this photo and read these 5 things: 1. I don't eat raw onions but love them grilled or as onions rings. 2. Not a fan of cold…
body:
If you follow me on Instagram (username: amytangerine), you may have already seen this photo and read these 5 things:

1. I don't eat raw onions but love them grilled or as onions rings.

2. Not a fan of cold weather but I sure do love coats.

3. At the end of my showers, I turn the water as hot as I can stand it before turning it off.

4. It's really easy for me to get addicted to video games. Right now I love Fun Run.

5. Every time I get my haircut I debate whether I should keep my bangs or get rid of them.

Thought it would be fun to post an additional 5 here on the blog as well:

6. Trying really hard to change my pack rat ways by becoming more of a minimalist. Turns out it's really hard, I just love too much "stuff".

7. It bothers me when my nails get too long. I like to keep them short and usually have to cut them twice a week because they grow so fast.

8. I lose so many hairs on a daily basis, it's a wonder that I have any left on my head. And when I purchase a house I don't think I will choose light tile for the bathroom floors.

9. I'm allergic to cats, dust, mold, grass, and pollen. Although I've tested positive for being allergic to oysters and dogs, I remain in denial for both.

10. My hands are always cold.

So how about you... Do you share any of the same quirks?
